title: chrysophtalmum montanum
intro: Chrysophtalmum montanum, also known as Tanacetum parthenium, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysophtalmum montanum include relieving fever, headaches, and menstrual cramps, as well as soothing skin irritations and reducing anxiety. Chrysophtalmum montanum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
